name: Bitch X Rich - In the Drawing Class
overview:
Chung-ah is the most popular girl at her elite, private high school. She's used to getting her way and being fawned over. But her perfect life comes crashing down when Rena transfers to her school. While trying to bring Rena under her thumb, Chung-ah discovers that she is secretly the daughter of a powerful political family, and Rena discovers that Chung-ah's glamourous life has been a lie!

A spin-off of the drama series "Bitch x Rich".

trailers.title: 대한민국 상위 1% 미술반의 일진놀이 [청담국제고등학교 미술반] 1-5화 몰아보기
